description: Create a chat session inside a notebook (POST /api/chat/sessions).
rules: remote-mutating: creates a chat-session resource on the live server
MODEL_OVERRIDE optional — pins a specific model for the session
writes the created session JSON to record_store/chat_session.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL, NOTEBOOK_ID, and SESSION_TITLE (MODEL_OVERRIDE optional). Output: chat_session.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server. Sending messages is a separate perk (chat_send).
